Hero.title: 발리 요가 지도자 과정
Hero.description: 우붓에서 진행되는 Yoga Alliance 인증 100시간, 200시간, 300시간 과정. 소규모 수업, 경험 많은 강사진, 깊이 있는 실습.
Hero.subtitle: 발리 우붓의 Yoga Alliance 인증 요가 지도자 과정

Course100.title: 100시간 요가 지도자 과정
Course100.summary: 초보 요가 수련자를 위한 11일 멀티 스타일 요가 지도자 과정이며 Yoga Alliance 인증 과정입니다.

Course200.title: 200시간 요가 지도자 과정
Course200.summary: 초급 및 중급 수련자를 위한 대표 21일 집중 과정입니다. Yoga Alliance 인증 지도자가 되어 전 세계에서 가르칠 수 있습니다.

Course300.title: 300시간 고급 요가 지도자 과정
Course300.summary: 200시간 인증 지도자가 아사나, 철학, 멘토링을 더 깊게 배우기 위한 고급 과정입니다.

Manifesto.title: 우리의 철학
Manifesto.quote: 요가는 모두를 위한 것입니다. 전통 지혜와 현대 과학이 조화롭게 만나는 길입니다.
Manifesto.description1: Bali YTTC는 우붓에 위치한 Yoga Alliance 등록 학교입니다. 아사나, 프라나야마, 명상, 해부학, 철학, 지도법을 하나의 체계적인 기숙형 과정으로 배웁니다.
Manifesto.description2: 목표는 단순한 자격증이 아닙니다. 학생들은 더 깊어진 개인 수련, 명확한 수업 언어, 실제 수업을 이끌 수 있는 충분한 실습 경험을 가지고 졸업합니다.
Manifesto.point3: 졸업 전 매일 진행되는 티칭 실습

Pillars.title: 여섯 가지 기둥
Pillars.subtitle: 자신감 있는 요가 지도자를 위한 영적·실용적 프레임워크

FAQ.title: 필요한 모든 정보
FAQ.subtitle: 신청 전 궁금한 점이 있으신가요? 저희 팀이 적합한 과정을 선택할 수 있도록 도와드립니다.
FAQ.contactDesc: 원하는 답을 찾지 못했다면 직접 문의해 주세요.

items.a: A Yoga Alliance certified school in Ubud, Bali offering 100, 200 and 300 hour yoga teacher trainings.
Most students use VOA or B211A. Our admissions team guides you based on your training length and passport.
Comfortable yoga clothes, sunscreen, mosquito repellent, personal essentials and an open mind.

Apply.title: 요가 여정을 시작하세요
Apply.messagePlaceholder: 요가 경험, 웰니스 목표, 식이 요청 등...
Apply.successDesc: 신청이 성공적으로 제출되었습니다. 24시간 이내에 팀에서 연락드리겠습니다.
Apply.noPayment: 지금 결제는 필요하지 않습니다. 검토 후 개인 등록 링크를 보내드립니다.
Apply.freeCancel: 프로그램 시작 30일 전까지 무료 취소 가능
Apply.yogaAlliance: 국제적으로 인정받는 Yoga Alliance 인증 프로그램

Footer.description: 우붓, 발리의 Yoga Alliance 인증 지도자 과정으로 삶을 변화시킨 수천 명의 학생들과 함께하세요.

WhatsApp.hi: 안녕하세요! Bali YTTC에 대해 더 알고 싶습니다

manifesto.title: More Than a
manifesto.description: Bali YTTC is a sanctuary of deep learning. We merge authentic Vedic philosophy with modern alignment in Ubud's most healing environment.

cards.title: Yoga Alliance Certified
cards.desc: Fully accredited RYS 200 and 300 registry recognized worldwide for international teaching.

cards.title: All-Inclusive Ubud Sanctuary
cards.desc: Immersive stay, plant-based meals, daily practice space, and complete course materials.

cards.title: Global Alumni Community
cards.desc: Join an expansive network of graduates from 70+ countries practicing and teaching worldwide.

cards.title: Hands-on Teaching Practice
cards.desc: Graduate with real teaching experience, direct alignment feedback, and classroom confidence.

cards.title: Traditional Balinese Blessings
cards.desc: Take part in purification ceremonies, flower blessings, and temple-based cultural learning.

cards.title: Lifetime Support & Mentorship
cards.desc: Access continuing guidance, teacher check-ins, school updates, and career direction after graduation.

pillars.title: Asana Mastery
pillars.desc: Alignment-based practice across Hatha, Ashtanga and Vinyasa.

pillars.title: Pranayama & Breath
pillars.desc: Breath techniques to refine energy and awareness.

pillars.title: Applied Anatomy
pillars.desc: Functional anatomy applied to safe, intelligent teaching.

pillars.title: Vedic Philosophy
pillars.desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita and the eight limbs.

pillars.title: Teaching Methodology
pillars.desc: Cueing, sequencing and the art of holding space.

pillars.title: Hands-on Adjustments
pillars.desc: Hands-on assists with consent and clarity.

pillars.title: Meditation & Balinese Wisdom
pillars.desc: Guided meditation, inner stillness, Balinese ceremony and cultural wisdom.

experiences.title: Daily immersions, sacred ceremonies &
experiences.subtitle: Every training week features temple rituals, advanced workshops, beach practices, and meditative arts rooted in Balinese culture.
experiences.mobileHint: Tap any experience to learn more about what awaits you.

cards.title: Temple Purification
cards.desc: A sacred Balinese cleansing ceremony in the first week.

cards.title: Arm Balancing Workshop
cards.desc: Guided technique for strength, trust and balance.

cards.title: Sound Healing
cards.desc: Tibetan bowls and sound therapy for deep integration.

cards.title: Acro Yoga
cards.desc: Partner practice with trust, play and presence.

cards.title: Beach Yoga
cards.desc: Sunrise practice on Bali's quiet eastern coast.

cards.title: Mandala Painting
cards.desc: A meditative art practice to realign the mind.

teachers.title: World-Class Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Experienced instructors guide you with precision, compassion and lived practice.
teachers.cta: Learn directly from Yoga Alliance certified instructors with international experience

items.bio: Vivek blends classical Hatha discipline with fluid Vinyasa and authentic lineage.
Sachin teaches precise alignment, intelligent sequencing and safe adjustments.
Yuli brings Balinese warmth through Vinyasa, Yin Yoga and sound healing.
Sandeep bridges ancient texts and modern application for spiritual depth.

schedule.title: Secure Your Place for
schedule.subtitle: Small cohorts for personalized attention. Limited spots available per batch.

testimonials.title: Stories from our
testimonials.subtitle: Real transformations from yoga students who completed training in Ubud.
testimonials.readVerified: Read verified reviews from graduates worldwide

items.quote: I felt supported throughout the entire training and learned far more than I expected.
This training was life-changing and gave me clarity, strength and peace.
The teachers, nature and structure made this a magical place to learn.

finalCta.title: Begin your training journey in
finalCta.subtitle: Join 2,500+ graduates in an all-inclusive, Yoga Alliance certified training with small batches and guided practice.

intro.title: Where ancient lineage meets modern spiritual transformation.
intro.subtitle: Bali YTTC is a dedicated yoga school in the sacred highlands of Ubud, created for students who want more than a certificate.
intro.body: Since 2018, we have guided students from 70+ countries through Yoga Alliance certified training that blends traditional Vedic philosophy, precise alignment, teaching practice, pranayama, meditation and Balinese culture.

CoursesPage.subtitle: Choose from our Yoga Alliance certified programs designed for every level of practitioner.
CoursesPage.ctaTitle: Not Sure Which Program is Right for You?
CoursesPage.ctaSubtitle: Our admissions team is here to help. Schedule a free consultation call and we'll guide you to the perfect program.
